metadata.name: Eternal
metadata.description: Phoenix Eternal: a perpetual futures exchange

instructions.name: PlaceMarketOrder
docs: Places an immediate-or-cancel order that consumes resting liquidity on the specified market.

accounts.name: phoenixProgram
docs: Phoenix Eternal program id; logged to assert the correct executable is invoked.

accounts.name: phoenixLogAuthority
docs: Phoenix log authority PDA used for emitting on-chain market events.

accounts.name: globalConfiguration
docs: Global configuration PDA; enforces the market is registered and cross trading is enabled.

accounts.name: traderWallet
docs: Trader authority placing the market order.

accounts.name: traderAccount
docs: Trader state PDA ("trader" account) holding balances and open positions.

accounts.name: perpAssetMap
docs: Perp asset map governing risk limits and funding parameters for the market.

accounts.name: globalTraderIndex
docs: Global trader index account.

accounts.name: activeTraderBuffer
docs: Active trader buffer account.

accounts.name: orderbook
docs: Market orderbook account that stores resting liquidity.

accounts.name: splines
docs: Spline collection PDA that tracks market-making programs for this market.

instructions.name: UpdateOraclePricesWithOrdering
docs: Updates oracle-provided spot and perp prices for one or more perpetual markets with monotonic timestamp ordering.

docs: Global configuration PDA; provides oracle authority and quote decimals for conversions.

docs: Wallet authorised to submit oracle price updates (root oracle or delegated user).

docs: Permission account recording oracle capabilities and remaining allowances.

docs: Perpetual asset map storing mark price state and oracle metadata.

instructions.name: UpdateSplinePrice
docs: Updates the mid-price for a spline market-making program on the specified market.

docs: Spline trader account whose price is being updated.

docs: Spline collection PDA containing the spline configuration and pricing data.

instructions.name: DepositFunds
docs: Deposits collateral tokens from a trader's token account into the global vault, crediting the trader's account.

accounts.name: phoenixProgram

docs: Authority of the trader account making the deposit.

docs: Trader's token account from which funds are transferred.

docs: SPL Token program for executing the transfer.

instructions.name: RegisterTrader
docs: Registers a new trader account with the specified configuration and position capacity.

accounts.name: phoenixProgram

accounts.name: phoenixLogAuthority
docs: Phoenix log authority PDA used for emitting on-chain market events.

accounts.name: globalConfiguration
docs: Global configuration PDA that validates the trader registration.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Account paying for the trader account creation and rent exemption.

accounts.name: traderWallet
docs: Authority that will control the trader account; used to derive the trader PDA.

accounts.name: traderAccount
docs: Trader state PDA to be created; derived from ["trader", trader_wallet, [trader_pda_index, trader_subaccount_index]].

accounts.name: systemProgram
docs: System program for creating the trader account.

instructions.name: LiquidateViaMarketOrder
docs: Liquidates a trader's position by executing an immediate-or-cancel market order to reduce their exposure.

accounts.name: phoenixProgram
docs: Phoenix Eternal program id; logged to assert the correct executable is invoked.

accounts.name: phoenixLogAuthority

docs: Global configuration PDA; enforces the market is registered and liquidation is enabled.

accounts.name: liquidatorWallet
docs: Liquidator authority executing the liquidation.

accounts.name: liquidatedTrader
docs: Trader account being liquidated (must be in liquidatable state).

docs: Trader state PDA ("trader" account) holding balances and open positions.

instructions.name: LiquidationTransfer
docs: Transfers positions directly between a liquidator and liquidatee once the liquidatee is flagged as unhealthy.

docs: Authority of the liquidator who receives transferred positions.

instructions.name: CloseMatchedPositions
docs: Closes offsetting positions between an at-loss trader and an in-profit trader during ADL.

accounts.name: phoenixProgram

docs: Perp asset map account containing risk parameters used to validate the ADL transfer.

accounts.name: caller
docs: ADL authority invoking the matched close instruction.

accounts.name: globalTraderIndex
docs: Global trader index account.

accounts.name: activeTraderBuffer
docs: Active trader buffer account.

accounts.name: atLossAccount
docs: Trader account currently at a loss whose matched exposure will be closed.

accounts.name: inProfitAccount
docs: Trader account with offsetting profitable exposure to receive the transfer.

instructions.name: Log
docs: Internal instruction used by the Phoenix log authority to emit events on-chain.
This instruction is called via CPI and should not be invoked directly.

accounts.name: phoenixLogAuthority
docs: Phoenix log authority PDA that must sign via CPI.

args.name: header
docs: Log header containing batch index and event count.

args.name: events
docs: Serialized event data (variable length).

instructions.name: WithdrawFunds

accounts.name: perpAssetMap
docs: Perp asset map tracking positions and risk metrics.

accounts.name: globalTraderIndex
docs: Global trader index account.

accounts.name: activeTraderBuffer
docs: Active trader buffer account.

accounts.name: orderbook
docs: Market orderbook account that stores resting liquidity.

accounts.name: splines
docs: Spline collection PDA that tracks market-making programs for this market.

types.name: OrderPacket
docs: Serialized parameters for Phoenix order placement instructions.

types.name: OrderPacketKind
docs: Supported order variants accepted by the Phoenix matching engine.

types.name: Side
docs: Trading direction for an order.

types.name: SelfTradeBehavior
docs: Policy for handling matches against the submitting trader's resting orders.

types.name: BaseLots
docs: Quantity wrapper representing discrete base lots.

types.name: QuoteLots
docs: Quantity wrapper representing discrete quote lots.

types.name: Ticks
docs: Discrete price unit measured in quote lots per base lot.

types.name: BaseLotsPerTick
docs: Density of liquidity per tick for spline market making.

types.name: OrderFlags
docs: Bitmask flags applied to an order (currently only the reduce-only bit is used).

types.name: OrderIds
docs: Collection of cancel identifiers used to target specific resting orders.

types.name: CancelUpToInstruction
docs: Parameters controlling cancel-up-to behaviour.

types.name: CancelId
docs: Identifies a resting order along with an optional hint into the orderbook.

types.name: FIFOOrderId
docs: Stable identifier for a resting order composed of price ticks and sequence number.

types.name: NodePointer
docs: Pointer hint into the orderbook linked list; zero represents a null pointer.

types.name: Symbol
docs: Fixed-width (16 byte) asset symbol stored as UTF-8 with trailing zero padding.

types.name: Price
docs: Price representation composed of a mantissa (`value`) and decimal exponent (`expo`).

types.name: OraclePriceUpdate
docs: Single oracle price update targeting a specific perpetual asset.

types.name: UpdateOraclePricesWithOrderingInstruction
docs: Oracle instruction payload containing ordered price updates and timestamp reset policy.

types.name: UpdateSplinePriceParams
docs: Parameters for updating a spline's mid-price.

types.name: DepositFundsInstruction
docs: Parameters for depositing collateral into the global vault.

types.name: RegisterTraderParams
docs: Parameters for registering a new trader account.

types.name: LiquidationParams
docs: Parameters for liquidating a trader's position via market order.

types.name: TransferRequest
docs: Transfer payload describing how many base lots of an asset should move from the liquidatee to the liquidator.

types.name: LiquidationTransferParams
docs: Parameters controlling liquidation transfers between traders.

types.name: ClosePositionsParams
docs: Parameters for closing matched positions between at-loss and in-profit traders.

types.name: MultipleOrderPacket
docs: Batch order packet for placing multiple post-only limit orders in a single transaction.

types.name: CondensedOrder
docs: Condensed order representation for batch order placement (price, size, and optional TiF).

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount in quote lots to withdraw.

fields.name: logBatchIndex
docs: Index of this log batch for tracking event sequences.
